comment_content:
Can only see the highlights but does not look that a bad game.  
My feeling for Scarles who was devastated at missing a key ball, but there seemed to be many other just misses at the other end too, and Aeriola seemed to have a lucky game, not holding onto that ball enough. Needs to stop pushing the ball straight in front of him. 
Paqueta seemed simplistic with his shots, did he want to score?
The ball might not have run for West Ham today, but they cannot afford to dwell on their bad luck.
West Ham need to MAKE the ball run for them, to MAKE their luck..
Scarles needs to rise above his mistake with even greater determination to succeed. He can do it!
They may just have the right Manager to work on that psychologically.
